race.comment: EIGHTEEN MONTHS (3) is a six-start maiden who finished seventh at his most recent appearance over 1000m at Donald. In new yard and is among the top chances in what looks a suitable race. AQUILINO (5) missed the frame when resuming last start over 1010m at Moruya but wasn't all that far from the winner. Expected to feature in the finish. FERVI (9) finished tenth at her last appearance over 1107m at Kilmore on June 1. Has a host of gear changes for this and gets one more chance. AERIAL ARTIST (13) should find this a bit easier and keeps Boudvillain. Not forgetting.
